titleStmt.title: SII 22.405: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 405. (A.R. No. 405 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, PERUNDUṞAI (near TIRUMAYYAM) SATYANĀRĀYAṆA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE WEST WALL TRIBH. KULASĒKHARADĒVA—13+13th YEAR

summary.p: Stones containing this inscription are misplaced and some are lost. This seems to register an endowment of land (at Veḷḷūr) placed in-charge of the Śrīvaishṇavas of the temple of Kaṇḍidēva-Viṇṇagar at Perunduṟai in Kāṉa-nāḍu, by Kaṇḍaṉ Aḻagukaṇḍa-Perumāḷ and his elder brother Kaṇḍaṉ Āḷuḍaiyāṉ alias Kalvāyil-Nāḍāḻvāṉ to provide for the worship of god Tavamuḍaiya-Pāṇḍīśar consecrated by them (it is not clear where).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cirikulacekaratevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 3- vatiṉ Etir 10 3vatu tirumukappaṭiy kāṉaṉāṭāṉa virutarājapuyaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu kāṉanāṭṭu peru
ntuṟai kaṇṭitevaviṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tavamuṭaiyap[ Āṇṭiśa] ṟku kaṇṭaṉ Aḻakukaṇṭa perumāḷeṉ Eṅkaḷ Aṇṇāḻvi kaṇṭaṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉāṉa kalvāyil nāṭāḻvārum nāṉum cantirātita
val cella Eṅkaḷ Āvitam tirunāmattāl Ukantu Aruḷivitta Ittava muṭaiya pāṇṭi[ śar] kku tiruppaṭi māṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭa Aḻivukku viṭṭa Ūr veḷḷur Umāpatikuṭi tecam Aṉumanāyaṉāṉ Añcaṉa
maṅkalam nālu Ellaiuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilam Aṭaṅkalum śirivaiṣṇa varum ciāriyam ceyvārkaḷum payirpāttu kaṭamaikaṭṭi taṅkaḷ kaiyāl taravu kuṭuttu koḷvārkaḷ Āka tirumayattu Aṇṇāḻvi
Digital edition of SII 22.405 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
